# Semantic conventions for NATS

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

The Semantic Conventions for [NATS](https://nats.io/) extend and override the [Messaging Semantic Conventions](README.md).

`messaging.system` MUST be set to `"nats"` and SHOULD be provided **at span creation time**.

## Span attributes

For NATS, the following additional attributes are defined:

<!-- semconv messaging.nats -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->

Standard messaging attributes SHOULD also be used:

- `messaging.destination.name`: The NATS subject or JetStream stream name.
- `messaging.client.id`: The NATS client ID or JetStream consumer name.

[DocumentStatus]: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/otel/document-status
